query: Add a focused JVM test for `TaskRepositoryImpl.findTodayTasks()` and reuse the existing task fixtures instead of hand-building objects.
Fix `TaskDaoTest` after I changed the Room query for today's tasks. Keep it using the real database and update the assertions.
Write a `SignInViewModel` test for the magic-link flow using our Orbit test helpers and whatever shared base class the repo already has.
There is no fixture for this new entity yet. Create the companion `fixture()` function from scratch in `commonTest` before you add the repository test.
Create a new task details screen in Compose Multiplatform and wire it into navigation.
Update `AGENTS.md` so it tells agents to load the testing skill before writing tests.
Run `./gradlew foliary:jvmTest --tests "dev.appoutlet.foliary.data.task.TaskRepositoryImplTest"` and tell me whether it passes.
Refactor `TaskRepositoryImpl` production logic to use a different query, but do not add or change any tests yet.
